prerequisites: A Clockify account with access to the workspace you want to sync.
An API key generated from your Clockify Profile Settings (api_key).
The ID of the workspace to sync (workspace_id).
If your workspace is hosted in a specific region (for example euc1 or use2), optionally override the base API URL via api_url for the matching region.

authMethods.name: API key (X-Api-Key header)
authMethods.summary: Clockify authenticates each request with an API key sent in the X-Api-Key header. Generate the key in your Clockify Profile Settings and supply it as the connector's api_key secret field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Clockify API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Clockify and open your Profile Settings. Generate an API key and copy it. Provide this value as the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Find your workspace ID
setupSteps.body: Identify the ID of the workspace you want to sync. The workspaceId is the path parameter used throughout the Clockify API (for example /v1/workspaces/{workspaceId}) and appears on workspace objects returned by the API. Provide it as the required workspace_id field.

setupSteps.title: Set the API base URL (optional)
setupSteps.body: By default Clockify uses the global base URL https://api.clockify.me/api/v1/. If your workspace is hosted in a specific region, set the optional api_url field to the matching regional host (for example euc1.clockify.me or use2.clockify.me). Leave it unset to use the global endpoint.

setupSteps.title: Configure and verify the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the api_key, workspace_id, and optional api_url into the connector configuration. The connector sends the api_key in the X-Api-Key header on each request. Clockify enforces API rate limits, so syncs are throttled to stay within those limits.
